title: Anna Soden It Comes Out Your Bum
description: Anna’s brain is a bum. Come and see all the nice things that come out of it! Comedian, actor and award-nominated pantomime cow Anna Soden’s madcap debut comedy hour – full of songs, revenge and talking out your ass. Komedia New Comedian Semi Finalist 2025. Featured on Absolute Radio, BBC, Iheart Radio, and millions of views on Tiktok/Instagram. After a sell out run in 2025, It Comes Out Your Bum returns to Brighton fringe in 2026!

venue.name: Junk Poets at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peters Church, York Place, East Sussex
